entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its flowering response to water stress during panicle development.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Severe water deficit that occurs during the panicle development stage.

entities.name: PANICLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth stage of the plant where the panicle is formed.

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The biological process of flower production, which can be delayed by stress.

entities.name: MAIN SHOOT
entities.description: The primary stem of the pearl millet plant.

entities.name: TILLERS
entities.description: Secondary shoots of the pearl millet plant.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of grain production from the main shoot and tillers.

entities.name: ADAPTIVE MECHANISM
entities.description: Biological strategies used by the plant to survive drought stress.

relationships.description: causes losses on main shoot and increases on tillers
shows more pronounced delay than main shoot
shows less pronounced delay than tillers
compensates for losses on main shoot
